document_info.document_type: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy

business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Employers Liability: 1000000 each accident / 1000000 disease policy / 1000000 disease each employee
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy form WC 00 00 04. Endorsements listed: Waiver Of Our Right To Recover From Others, Alternate Employer, All States, and Terrorism Risk Insurance Act. Endorsements shown effective 2026-03-15.

concerns: Construction operations include carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, and interior painting classifications.
